name: halal-programming
description: Spiritual reminders woven into the coding workflow: a Bismillah startup gate, prayer-time blocker, and Alhamdulillah closing gate.

halalProgramming.prayerNotification.enab.description: Show a blocking reminder modal when a prayer time arrives.

halalProgramming.closingGate.enabled.description: Require typing/speaking the closing phrase before Ctrl+Shift+W / Ctrl+Q close the window. Turn off as an escape hatch if this misbehaves.

halalProgramming.location.latitude.description: Manual fallback latitude, used only if IP-based geolocation fails.

halalProgramming.location.longitude.description: Manual fallback longitude, used only if IP-based geolocation fails.

halalProgramming.calculationMethod.description: Aladhan API calculation method ID (e.g. 3 = Muslim World League, 20 = Kemenag RI / Indonesia).

halalProgramming.voiceLocale.description: Speech recognition locale used by the voice input option (voice support depends on your VS Code build and may not be available).

commands.title: Halal Programmer: Close Window (with closing phrase)
